rationale: The cited paper is topically related (its title and findings emphasize the “role of search on the Internet,” with Internet demand changing under tax-induced conditions), and the citing paper’s core constructs include consumer search costs in online retail. However, the available evidence is only a DOI match with no in-text citation context, and the two papers differ substantially in design (theoretical platform-fee model vs. empirical tax natural experiment), so substantive reliance is plausible but not demonstrated.
